perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a female creator standing in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding a pink Godiva x Labubu chocolate gift set. She is wearing a red Kangol bucket hat, a white top, and a black textured vest. (2) She brings the box closer to the camera to show three decorative tin jars featuring Labubu characters. (3) She continues to talk enthusiastically, gesturing with her hands and pointing at the price tag on the shelf behind her. (4) The camera alternates between medium shots of her and close-ups of the product details. (5) She touches her temple as if calculating and then points to the camera, concluding with a heart gesture and a thumbs-up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays throughout. (2) A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, energetic tone, introducing the product and comparing its price. (3) An off-screen male voice occasionally chimes in with short phrases or reactions like "200..." and "Oishi", providing a conversational feel. (4) High-pitched 'sparkle' sound effects trigger when the price and decorative text appear on screen. (5) Subtle warehouse ambient noise is present but heavily filtered by the music and speech.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative title: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE Godiva & Labubu' remains at the top. (2) Hook text: '超美鐵盒巧克力' (Super beautiful tin box chocolate) appears at the bottom. (3) Functional text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout. (4) Decorative text: '$899元' appears with a star-shaped graphic. (5) Narrative captions: '買2送1' (Buy 2 get 1) and '留言告訴我們' (Leave a comment and tell us) appear towards the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a logic of Product Introduction -> Price Comparison -> Value Proposition -> Call to Action.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 2 blurry passers-by in the deep background background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long pigtails, wearing a red bucket hat, a white long-sleeved shirt, and a black furry vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse aisle stacked high with pink Godiva gift boxes on the right and other merchandise on the left. Fluorescent overhead lighting is visible.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and price comparison for a Godiva x Labubu chocolate set at Costco. The creator highlights the cost-effectiveness of buying the set at Costco compared to individual tins at convenience stores to encourage viewers to purchase the item and engage with the content through comments.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is actively promoting a specific product found at Costco and comparing its price to competitors.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with a signature red bucket hat.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes 'bargain hunting' psychology by doing 'math' on screen to prove the deal's value.
